stocks.ai_explanation: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) is a major American multinational corporation engaged in the exploration, production, refining, marketing, and distribution of petroleum products and natural gas liquids. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

Chevron Corporation (CVX) is an American multinational corporation involved in the exploration, development, production, transportation, and sale of oil and natural gas. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

NextEra Energy Inc. (NEE) is a Fortune 500 company based in Florida, United States, which provides renewable energy services through wind, solar, hydroelectric power generation, and energy storage. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Shell plc (SHEL) is a British multinational oil and gas company headquartered in London, UK, that operates in various countries around the world. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
British Petroleum (BP) is a multinational oil and gas company headquartered in London, UK, that operates in various countries around the world. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

disclaimer: Educational use only. Not financial advice.
